title: Beauty, Personal
content:
In good looks I am not a star.
     There are others more lovely by far.
        But my face - I don't mind it,
        Because I'm behind it -
     It's the people in front that I jar.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Unknown, titled "Beauty, Personal", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
